Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import PyPDF2
import sys

pdf_path = "/Applications/DeanyGitHub/معايير ايوفي 61 معيار طبعة 2022.pdf"
try:
    reader = PyPDF2.PdfReader\(pdf_path\)
    total_pages = len\(reader.pages\)
    print\(f"Total pages: {total_pages}"\)
    print\(f"---"\)
    # Extract text from first 10 pages to understand structure
    for i in range\(min\(10, total_pages\)\):
        text = reader.pages[i].extract_text\(\)
        print\(f"=== PAGE {i+1} ==="\)
        print\(text[:1500] if text else "\(no extractable text\)"\)
        print\(\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"Error: {e}", file=sys.stderr\)
PYEOF)

Bash(cat > /tmp/detailed_audit.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

echo "=== DETAILED NAVIGATION AUDIT ==="
echo ""

files=\(
  "src/DEANY-M1L1.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-S2L1.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-S2L2.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-S2L3.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-S2L4.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-S2L5.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-S2L6.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-S2L7.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-B1L1.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-B1L2.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-B1L3.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-HB1L1.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-HB1L2.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-HIFZ-FATIHA.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-TAFSIR-FATIHA.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-COMPASS.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-PRAYER-VIS.jsx"
  "DEANY_M1L2.jsx"
  "DEANY_M1L3.jsx"
  "DEANY_M1L4.jsx"
  "DEANY_M1L5.jsx"
  "DEANY_HB1_L1.jsx"
  "DEANY_HB1_L2.jsx"
  "DEANY_HB1_L4.jsx"
  "DEANY_HB1_L5.jsx"
\)

cd /Applications/DeanyGitHub

for file in "${files[@]}"; do
  if [ -f "$file" ]; then
    echo "FILE: $file"
    
    # Check export signature
    export_line=$\(grep -n "export default" "$file" | head -1\)
    has_onback=$\(grep "export default.*onBack" "$file" | wc -l\)
    
    if [ $has_onback -gt 0 ]; then
      echo "  ✓ Has onBack parameter"
    else
      echo "  ✗ Missing onBack parameter"
    fi
    
    # Check if it uses onBack in a button
    uses_onback=$\(grep -c "onClick={onBack}\\|onClick.*onBack\\|onClick={.*onBack" "$file"\)
    if [ $uses_onback -gt 0 ]; then
      echo "  ✓ Uses onBack in onClick handler \($uses_onback times\)"
    else
      echo "  ✗ Never uses onBack in onClick"
    fi
    
    # Check for completion screen pattern
    has_complete=$\(grep -c "complete\\|Complete\\|COMPLETE" "$file"\)
    if [ $has_complete -gt 0 ]; then
      echo "  ℹ  Has completion screen logic"
    fi
    
    echo ""
  fi
done
EOF

bash /tmp/detailed_audit.sh)

Bash(cat > /tmp/final_audit.sh << 'BASHEOF'
#!/bin/bash
cd /Applications/DeanyGitHub

# Actual lesson files imported in App.jsx
declare -a FILES=\(
  "src/DEANY-M1L1.jsx"
  "../DEANY_M1L2.jsx:DEANY_M1L2"
  "../DEANY_M1L3.jsx:DEANY_M1L3"
  "../DEANY_M1L4.jsx:DEANY_M1L4"
  "../DEANY_M1L5.jsx:DEANY_M1L5"
  "src/DEANY-HB1L1.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-HB1L2.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-PRAYER-VIS.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-S2L1.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-S2L2.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-S2L3.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-S2L4.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-S2L5.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-S2L6.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-S2L7.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-HIFZ-FATIHA.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-TAFSIR-FATIHA.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-COMPASS.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-B1L1.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-B1L2.jsx"
  "src/DEANY-B1L3.jsx"
\)

echo "=== COMPREHENSIVE DEAD-END AUDIT ==="
echo "Checking each lesson file imported in App.jsx for navigation dead ends"
echo ""

for entry in "${FILES[@]}"; do
  # Parse file path and name
  IFS=':' read -r filepath name <<< "$entry"
  name=${name:-$\(basename "$filepath" .jsx\)}
  
  # Resolve relative paths from src/
  if [[ "$filepath" == "../"* ]]; then
    fullpath="/Applications/DeanyGitHub/$\(echo $filepath | sed 's|^\\.\\./||'\)"
  else
    fullpath="/Applications/DeanyGitHub/$filepath"
  fi
  
  if [ -f "$fullpath" ]; then
    echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
    echo "LESSON: $name"
    echo "PATH: $fullpath"
    
    # Check function signature
    sig=$\(grep -E "export default.*function|const.*=.*\\\({|function.*\\\({" "$fullpath" | head -1\)
    echo "SIGNATURE: $sig"
    
    # Check for onBack in signature \(flexible\)
    if grep -q "onBack\\|onGoBack\\|goBack" "$fullpath"; then
      echo "HAS BACK NAVIGATION: YES"
    else
      echo "HAS BACK NAVIGATION: NO"
    fi
    
    # Check completion screen
    if grep -q "Complete\\|Finish\\|Results\\|complete\\|finished" "$fullpath"; then
      echo "HAS COMPLETION SCREEN: YES"
    else
      echo "HAS COMPLETION SCREEN: NO"
    fi
    
    # Check for back button on ANY screen
    back_count=$\(grep -c "onClick.*Back\\|onClick.*onBack\\|goBack\\|onClick={goBack}" "$fullpath" || echo 0\)
    if [ "$back_count" -gt 0 ]; then
      echo "BACK BUTTONS FOUND: $back_count"
    else
      echo "BACK BUTTONS FOUND: 0 ⚠️ "
    fi
    
    # Verdict
    if grep -q "onBack\\|goBack" "$fullpath" && [ "$back_count" -gt 0 ]; then
      echo "VERDICT: SAFE ✓"
    elif grep -q "onBack\\|goBack" "$fullpath" && [ "$back_count" -eq 0 ]; then
      echo "VERDICT: POTENTIAL DEAD END - has onBack but doesn't use it ⚠️"
    else
      echo "VERDICT: DEAD END - no back navigation ✗"
    fi
    echo ""
  fi
done
BASHEOF

bash /tmp/final_audit.sh)

Bash(cat > /tmp/orphan_audit.sh << 'BASHEOF'
#!/bin/bash
cd /Applications/DeanyGitHub

echo "=== ORPHANED FILES AUDIT ==="
echo "\(Not imported in App.jsx, but checking for dead-end issues anyway\)"
echo ""

files=\(
  "DEANY_HB1_L1.jsx"
  "DEANY_HB1_L2.jsx"
  "DEANY_HB1_L4.jsx"
  "DEANY_HB1_L5.jsx"
  "DEANY_B1_Shahadah_Lesson2_ShipReady_Final.jsx"
\)

for file in "${files[@]}"; do
  if [ -f "$file" ]; then
    echo "FILE: $file"
    
    # Check signature
    sig=$\(grep "export default.*function\\|export default.*const" "$file" | head -1\)
    echo "  SIGNATURE: $sig"
    
    # Check for onBack
    if grep -q "onBack" "$file"; then
      echo "  HAS onBack: YES"
    else
      echo "  HAS onBack: NO ✗"
    fi
    
    # Check for back buttons
    back_count=$\(grep -c "onClick.*Back\\|onClick.*onBack\\|goBack" "$file" || echo 0\)
    echo "  BACK BUTTONS: $back_count"
    
    echo ""
  fi
done
BASHEOF

bash /tmp/orphan_audit.sh)
